title: More Radical Trainers Localization Pack
description: Added localization support for More Radical Trainers and added correct badge displays in achievements.
body:
### Please install strictly according to the version required by this datapack. Using a v1.7 localization pack on More Radical Trainers(v1.8) may break the original text.
***
I have added some support for [More Radical Trainers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-radical-trainers), but since the additional content I submitted may affect the installation and maintenance of the original project. Therefore, after receiving permission for distribution, I have separated the localization part into an independent datapack for those who need it.

(Due to technical limitations of rctmod, it currently does not support translation keys for trainers' names and dialogs.)

### Contents:
- Modified achievement icons for 35 Leader Trainers from different regions, using icons from the [Cobblemon Pokémon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges) mod.(This feature is included in the update of More Radical Trainers 1.6+.)

- The achievement texts for all trainers have been extracted from version 1.7 and converted into translation keys to add localization support. Currently includes English, Chinese, and Brazilian Portuguese.

### Tips:
- You need to download [More Radical Trainers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-radical-trainers) as a prerequisite; otherwise, the localization pack will have no effect.

- The localization pack must be loaded above More Radical Trainers, or it will not work.

- Due to the nature of translation keys, you also need to copy the localization pack to the resourcepacks folder and enable it to load the text properly.

- If you did not add this datapack when creating the world, you may not be able to set its priority, and the same applies to multiplayer.  To resolve this, you need to extract both zip files, then overwrite More Radical Trainers with the localization pack and replace all conflicting files.  Datapacks do not necessarily need to be compressed into a zip file to be loaded.  If you choose to recompress it, please ensure you know what you're doing, as incorrect operations may cause the datapack to fail to load or become corrupted.  Additionally, if you do not have permission from Fyre520, please do not distribute the merged pack elsewhere.

- In theory, the above operations should not cause world corruption, but please back up your world before merging to prevent any unexpected issues.


**If you would like to submit translations for other languages, feel free to contact me.**
